name: ModelObjectSelector
summary: The ModelObjectSelector class can be used to make different model object selections from the current model.

methods.name: GetAllObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects.

methods.name: GetAllObjectsWithType(.Type[])
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model with the given base type.

params.name: TypeFilter
params.doc: The types of the objects to return.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects with the given types.

methods.name: GetAllObjectsWithType(ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum)
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model with the given type.

params.name: Enum
params.doc: The type of the objects to return.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects with the given type.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects.

methods.name: GetFilteredObjectsWithType
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of the model objects in the current model with the given type and selected by the filter.

params.name: Enum
params.doc: The type of the objects to return.

params.name: FilterName
params.doc: The name of an existing selection filter to apply.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of the model objects with the given type and selected by the filter.

methods.name: GetObjectsByBoundingBox
methods.signature: public ModelObjectEnumerator GetObjectsByBoundingBox(Point MinPoint, Point MaxPoint)
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of the model objects in the current model colliding with the given geometrical bounding box. Note that this method uses approximate bounding boxes and thus is NOT EXACT, and may return objects not necessarily colliding with the given box but only being somewhere near to it.

params.name: MinPoint
params.doc: The minimum point of the bounding box.

params.name: MaxPoint
params.doc: The maximum point of the bounding box.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of the model objects colliding with the given bounding box.

methods.name: GetObjectsByFilter
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of the model objects in the current model selected by the given selection filter definition.

params.name: FilterExpression
params.doc: The definition of a selection filter to apply.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of the objects selected by the filter.

methods.name: GetObjectsByFilterName
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of the model objects in the current model selected by the given selection filter.

params.name: FilterName
params.doc: The name of an existing selection filter to apply.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of the objects selected by the filter.
